ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country is in */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ownership record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "guns_per_100" INTEGER /* Number of guns per 100 inhabitants */,
  "average_firearms_per_100" REAL /* Average number of firearms per 100 people */,
  "average_total_civilian_firearms" REAL /* Average total number of all civilian firearms */,
  "firearm_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of firearm */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_ownership_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_ownership_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES firearm_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_ownership_firearm_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_type_id") REFERENCES firearm_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homicide_rates" (
  "homicide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for homicide record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "homicides_by_firearm" INTEGER /* Number of homicides by firearm */,
  "firearm_homicide_rate" REAL /* Homicide by firearm rate per 100,000 population */,
  "percent_homicides_by_firearm" REAL /* Percentage of homicides committed by firearm */,
  "homicide_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of homicide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("homicide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homicide_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homicide_rates_homicide_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("homicide_type_id") REFERENCES homicide_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_shootings" (
  "mass_shooting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for mass shooting record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "number_of_incidents" INTEGER /* Number of mass shooting incidents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the mass shooting took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mass_shooting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mass_shootings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source providing firearm ownership data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firearm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homicide_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each homicide type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the homicide type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the homicide type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., firearm ownership, homicide rates) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "economic_factor" TEXT /* Economic factor correlated with firearm ownership/homicide rates */,
  "firearm_ownership_rate" REAL /* Firearm ownership rate */,
  "homicide_rate" REAL /* Homicide rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
